title: DOI Phase 8 — Foundational Pillars Assessment
description: Structured form of departments/{dept-slug}/assessments/foundational.md. Three foundational pillars (Talent Strategy, Workflow Optimization, Digital Architecture), each scored 3-15 with 3 sub-dimensions scored 1-5. Every score must cite evidence from prior phases.

foundational_level.description: 1 = Information Silos (9-20), 2 = Integratable Cloud (21-34), 3 = Unified Data Layer (35-45).

total_foundational.description: Sum of the three pillar totals. Must equal sum of pillars[*].score.

advanced_gate_eligible.description: True iff foundational_level == 3 AND every pillar score >= 8/15. Drives whether advanced.md is produced.

gate_failure_reason.description: Why the advanced gate failed, when advanced_gate_eligible is false.

tool_validation_notes.description: Free-form prose on claimed-vs-observed tool capabilities, per the mandatory Tool Validation step.

evidence_cite.description: File path with optional section/line — e.g. 'verified-role.md §2', 'gap-analysis.md row 4', '_uploads/MANIFEST.md row 7'.

rating_15.description: Sub-dimension score 0-5 with justification and evidence citation. Note: scale is 1-5 in the SKILL but allowing 0 for forward compatibility with future scoring scripts that may emit a zero for missing evidence.

score.description: Pillar total. Must equal sum of sub_dimensions[*].score.

sub_dimensions.description: Three sub-dimensions per foundational pillar. Each is a rating_15.
